  • CV
  • Publications
  • Talks & Conferences
  • Teaching and Supervision

    Reymond Akpanya

    Postdoctoral Research Associate in Mathematics at the University of Sydney. Working with Prof. John Voight. Research in combinatorial topology, simplicial surfaces, and topological interlocking assemblies.

    • Sydney, Australia
    • The University of Sydney
